# dns-he-net_zone (Data Source)

DNS zone

**Deprecation Notice:** This data source is deprecated and will be removed in v0.2.0. Please use `dns-he-net_domain_zone` or `dns-he-net_arpa_zone` instead.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve Zone information.
data "dns-he-net_zone" "example" {
  id = 123456
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) dns.he.net zone id

### Read-Only

- `name` (String) zone name
